metadata.description: XdrLogRaider — Sentinel content (parsers, workbooks, analytic rules, hunting queries).

tags.name: description
tags.value: Compliance + pipeline drift events that occurred outside business hours (0900-1700 UTC) or on weekends. Attackers prefer making config changes off-hours to avoid review-window oversight.

tags.name: description
tags.value: Correlate Defender XDR configuration drift with AuditLogs actor UPNs to surface "who changed what". Useful for post-incident retrospective and change-control reviews.

properties.query:
// Note: drift EntityIds and AuditLogs target identifiers are not reliable to
// join at the record level. This query approximates by actor UPN within a
// time window of the drift event, filtered to Defender-related audit
// categories.
let drift = union
(MDE_Drift_Inventory(7d, 1d)),
(MDE_Drift_Configuration(7d, 6h)),
(MDE_Drift_Exposure(7d, 1h));
let audits = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where Category in (
'PolicyManagement',
'DefenderXdrSettings',
'Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps',
'Microsoft Defender for Identity',
'Unified audit',
'Azure Active Directory'
)
| extend ActorUpn = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUpn)
| project AuditTime = TimeGenerated, ActorUpn, Operation = OperationName, Category, AuditResult = Result;
drift
| join kind=leftouter (audits) on $left.TimeGenerated == $right.AuditTime
| extend ActorUpn = coalesce(ActorUpn, 'unknown (no correlating audit)')
| summarize DriftEvents = count(),
Streams = make_set(StreamName),
Operations = make_set(Operation)
by ActorUpn
| order by DriftEvents desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Full current text of all tenant custom detections — governance review artifact.

properties.query: MDE_CustomDetections_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | extend Name = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).displayName), Enabled = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).isEnabled), Query = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).queryText), Schedule = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).schedule) | project EntityId, Name, Enabled, Schedule, Query, TimeGenerated

tags.name: description
tags.value: File/path/process exclusions ADDED to AV/EDR policy in the last 90 days. Attackers abuse exclusions for persistence — adding a path that hosts their malware effectively whitelists it from Defender scanning.

tags.name: description
tags.value: Live Response sessions initiated without a paired incident or investigation.

properties.displayName: MDE Live Response sessions without justification
properties.query: MDE_ActionCenter_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | extend Type = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).actionType), InvestigationId = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).investigationId) | where Type has "LiveResponse" and isempty(InvestigationId)

tags.name: description
tags.value: Changes to MDI directory service account classifications.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Inventory(30d, 1d) | where StreamName == "MDE_IdentityServiceAccounts_CL"

tags.name: description
tags.value: Role assignments to accounts that previously had none.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Configuration(30d, 1d) | where StreamName == "MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL" and ChangeType == "Added" | join kind=inner (MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId) on EntityId

tags.name: description
tags.value:
Composite signal combining suppression-rule additions + PUA protection disables
in the same day. Both are legitimate admin actions on their own; together they
suggest an attacker quieting alerts before running unwanted code.

properties.query: let drift = MDE_Drift_Configuration(7d, 1h); let suppressions = drift | where StreamName == "MDE_SuppressionRules_CL" and ChangeType == "Added"; let puaOff = drift | where StreamName == "MDE_PUAConfig_CL" and FieldName == "enabled" and NewValue == "false"; union suppressions, puaOff | summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | where Events >= 2

tags.name: description
tags.value: Nodes newly identified as chokepoints — they sit on many attack paths.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Exposure(30d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_XspmChokePoints_CL" and ChangeType == "Added"

properties.serializedData:
{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_ActionCenter","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Action Center

Per-device unified timeline events plus per-action machine-action results (Live Response per-step output and AIR linkage)."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"summary-panel","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Action Center summary by status","size":0,"query":"MDE_MachineActions_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionId
| summarize Count = count() by ActionStatus, ActionType
| order by Count desc","version":"KqlItem/1.0","visualization":"barchart"},"type":3},{"name":"device-timeline-panel","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Device timeline events (per-device)","size":0,"query":"MDE_DeviceTimeline_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| project EventTime, MachineId, EventType, EventId, ProcessName, FileName, Severity, TimeGenerated
| order by EventTime desc
| take 200","version":"KqlItem/1.0","visualization":"table"},"type":3},{"name":"machine-actions-detail-panel","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Machine actions detail (Live Response output and AIR linkage)","size":0,"query":"MDE_MachineActions_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionId
| extend DurationMinutes = iff(isnotnull(CompletedTime) and isnotnull(CreatedTime), datetime_diff('minute', CompletedTime, CreatedTime), int(null))
| project CreatedTime, CompletedTime, DurationMinutes, ActionId, ActionType, ActionStatus, MachineId, Operator, InvestigationId, ScriptOutput, TimeGenerated
| order by CreatedTime desc","version":"KqlItem/1.0","visualization":"table"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# MDE Compliance Dashboard

Current state of Defender XDR tenant security configuration, with recent drift highlighted.

**Data source**: P0 tenant-configuration streams polled hourly by the XdrLogRaider Function App."},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timerange-param","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0},"name":"parameters"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_Heartbeat_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where Tier == 'P0'
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Streams = max(StreamsSucceeded) by FunctionName
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen > ago(30m), 'Healthy', 'Stale')","size":0,"title":"Connector health (last hour)","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"health-panel"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1h)
| summarize Changes = count() by StreamName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"P0 drift events","queryType":0},"name":"drift-timechart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_LiveResponseConfig_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId
| project EntityId, FeatureName, AutomatedIrLiveResponse, AutomatedIrUnsignedScripts, LiveResponseForServers, TimeGenerated","size":0,"title":"Live Response config","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"lr-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let drift = MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1h)
    | extend DriftTime = TimeGenerated, DriftBin = bin(TimeGenerated, 5min);
let audits = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
    | project AuditTime = TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedByUpn = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), AuditBin = bin(TimeGenerated, 5min);
drift
| join kind=leftouter audits on $left.DriftBin == $right.AuditBin
| where isnull(AuditTime) or (AuditTime between ((DriftTime - 5min) .. (DriftTime + 5min)))
| extend DeltaSec = iff(isnull(AuditTime), int(null), abs(datetime_diff('second', AuditTime, DriftTime)))
| summarize arg_min(DeltaSec, OperationName, InitiatedByUpn, AuditTime) by DriftTime, StreamName, EntityId, FieldName, OldValue, NewValue, ChangeType
| project TimeGenerated = DriftTime, StreamName, EntityId, FieldName, OldValue, NewValue, ChangeType, OperationName, InitiatedByUpn
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Recent changes with attribution","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"recent-changes-table"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDEComplianceDashboard","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_DriftReport","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Drift Report

All configuration drift across P0/P1/P2/P5/P7 categories, unioned and enriched with AuditLogs attribution."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Drift events over time, by category","size":0,"query":"union
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1h) | extend Category = "P0 Config"),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 30m) | extend Category = "P1 Pipeline"),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d) | extend Category = "P2 Governance"),
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1d) | extend Category = "P5 Identity"),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d) | extend Category = "P7 Metadata")
| summarize Changes = count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Recent drift events (all categories)","size":0,"query":"union
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1h)),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 30m)),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d)),
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1d)),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d))
| project TimeGenerated, StreamName, EntityId, FieldName, OldValue, NewValue, ChangeType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_ExposureMap","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Exposure Map

XSPM attack paths, chokepoints, and exposure score trends."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Active attack paths","size":0,"query":"MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId
| project PathId, Source, Target, HopCount, Severity, Status, CreatedTime, TimeGenerated
| order by Severity asc, HopCount asc","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Exposure score trend","size":0,"query":"MDE_ExposureSnapshots_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| summarize AvgScore = avg(Score) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_GovernanceScorecard","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Governance Scorecard

RBAC, asset classification, and approval governance posture."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"RBAC device groups (current state)","size":0,"query":"MDE_RbacDeviceGroups_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId
| project Name, GroupId, Description, Priority, AutoRemediationLevel, MachineCount, RuleCount, IsUnassigned, LastUpdated, TimeGenerated","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Governance drift","size":0,"query":"MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d)
| summarize Changes = count() by StreamName
| render piechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_IdentityPosture","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Identity Posture

MDI service account coverage, DC onboarding, alert threshold drift."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Domain controller sensor coverage","size":0,"query":"MDE_DCCoverage_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId
| summarize Coverage = countif(IsActive == true), Total = count()
| extend CoveragePct = todouble(Coverage) / todouble(Total) * 100","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Identity drift over time","size":0,"query":"MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1d)
| summarize Changes = count() by StreamName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_ResponseAudit","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Response Audit

Action Center history with operators, comments, and time-to-action metrics."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Action Center summary by type and status","size":0,"query":"MDE_ActionCenter_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| summarize Count = count() by ActionType, ActionStatus
| render barchart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Time-to-action by action type","size":0,"query":"MDE_ActionCenter_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange:value})
| where isnotnull(StartTime) and isnotnull(EndTime)
| extend TimeToActionMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', EndTime, StartTime)
| project TimeGenerated, ActionId, ActionType, ActionStatus, ActionDecision, Operator, MachineId, ComputerName, TimeToActionMinutes
| order by TimeGenerated desc","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Configuration(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_AlertTuning_CL" | where ChangeType == "Modified" | where FieldName in ("conditions","scope")
properties.description: An alert tuning rule was widened — may hide genuine alerts from analysts.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Configuration(6h, 10m) | where StreamName == "MDE_ConnectedApps_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"
properties.description: A new third-party app was connected to Defender with API access.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Maintenance(1h, 10m) | where StreamName == "MDE_DataExportSettings_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"
properties.description: A new streaming/export destination was added to Defender data export settings. Potential data-exfiltration channel.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Inventory(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_LiveResponseConfig_CL" | where FieldName == "allowUnsignedScripts" and NewValue == "true"
properties.displayName: MDE Live Response unsigned scripts enabled
properties.description: The Defender Live Response unsigned-scripts policy was enabled tenant-wide. This allows arbitrary scripts to run on managed endpoints without code signing.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Inventory(2d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_DCCoverage_CL" | where FieldName == "hasSensor" and OldValue == "true" and NewValue == "false"
properties.description: A Defender for Identity domain controller sensor stopped reporting. Identity threat detection gap.

properties.query: union (MDE_Drift_Configuration(2h, 15m)), (MDE_Drift_Inventory(2h, 15m)) | extend HourOfDay = datetime_part("Hour", TimeGenerated) | where HourOfDay < 9 or HourOfDay >= 17
properties.displayName: MDE portal config change outside business hours
properties.description: A tenant-configuration change was made outside 0900-1700 local time.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Inventory(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_PUAConfig_CL" | where FieldName == "enabled" and NewValue == "false"
properties.description: Defender Potentially Unwanted Application protection was disabled tenant-wide.

properties.query:
MDE_Drift_Configuration(7d, 1d)
| where StreamName == "MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL"
| where ChangeType == "Added"
| where FieldName == "principalId" or FieldName == "principalName"
properties.displayName: MDE RBAC role to unusual account
properties.description:
A Defender unified-RBAC role was assigned to a new principal. Alerts on "who got a new role" — not on every role-definition tweak.

Suggested operator response:
1. Confirm the principalId resolves to a known and sanctioned admin account.
2. If unknown: cross-reference SigninLogs and recent privilege grants for related activity.
3. If sanctioned: suppress this principal for 30 days via the rule's suppression settings.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Maintenance(1h, 10m) | where StreamName == "MDE_StreamingApiConfig_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"
properties.description:
A new Event Hub or Storage target was configured for Defender telemetry streaming. Possible exfiltration channel.

Note: Microsoft has signaled the upstream streaming-API endpoint may be retired in favor of newer Defender XDR streaming feeds. Heartbeat diagnostics surface 403/404 if the endpoint becomes unreachable. See docs/STREAMS.md for current endpoint-availability tracking.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Configuration(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_SuppressionRules_CL" | where ChangeType == "Modified" | where FieldName in ("scope","conditions","machineGroup")
properties.description: An existing alert suppression rule had its scope widened — may silence legitimate alerts.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Inventory(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_AdvancedFeatures_CL" | where EntityId has "Tamper" | where FieldName == "Enabled" and NewValue == "false"
properties.description: Defender Tamper Protection was disabled. This allows malicious tools to modify Defender settings directly.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Configuration(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_TenantAllowBlock_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"
properties.description: A new URL, IP, file hash, or sender was added to the Defender tenant allow-list, bypassing blocks.

properties.query: MDE_Drift_Exposure(7d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"
properties.displayName: MDE XSPM new attack path discovered
properties.description:
A new attack path was identified in Defender Exposure Management (XSPM) — a route from an entry point to a critical asset.
Note: the MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL stream is opt-in. The rule is deployed but stays dormant until the stream is enabled in the connector configuration.

properties.query: MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | extend TargetCriticality = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).targetCriticality) | where TargetCriticality == "Critical" | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
properties.displayName: MDE XSPM path to critical asset
properties.description:
An attack path terminates at a device tagged Critical. Immediate remediation candidate.
Note: the MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL stream is opt-in. The rule is deployed but stays dormant until the stream is enabled in the connector configuration.
